allow:
Bash(GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY=/tmp/summary_test.md python3 << 'EOF'
import json, os
from datetime import datetime, timezone

trend_file = "reports/test_trend.json"
trend = json.load\(open\(trend_file\)\)

out = open\(os.environ["GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"], "a"\)
def w\(line=""\): out.write\(line + "\\n"\)

cur  = trend[-1]
prev = trend[-2] if len\(trend\) >= 2 else None

def delta\(key\):
    if not prev: return ""
    d = round\(cur.get\(key, 0\) - prev.get\(key, 0\), 1\)
    if d == 0:   return " _\(Вұ0\)_"
    arrow = "в–І" if d > 0 else "в–ј"
    return f" _\({arrow} {'+' if d>0 else ''}{d}\)_"

blocks = " в–Ғв–Ӯв–ғв–„в–…в–Ҷв–Үв–Ҳ"
recent = [e.get\("erfolgsrate", 0\) for e in trend[-10:]]
lo, hi = min\(recent\), max\(recent\)
span   = hi - lo if hi != lo else 1
spark  = "".join\(blocks[round\(\(v - lo\) / span * 8\)] for v in recent\)

w\("---"\)
w\("## рҹ“ү Test-Trend"\)
w\(\)
w\(f"| | Aktuell | Vorheriger Build |"\)
w\(f"|---|---|---|"\)
s_icon = "рҹҹў" if cur.get\("erfolgsrate", 0\) >= 90 else "рҹҹЎ" if cur.get\("erfolgsrate", 0\) >= 75 else "рҹ”ҙ"
c_icon = "рҹҹў" if cur.get\("avg_coverage", 0\) >= 75 else "рҹҹЎ" if cur.get\("avg_coverage", 0\) >= 50 else "рҹ”ҙ"
w\(f"| {s_icon} **Erfolgsrate** | **{cur.get\('erfolgsrate',0\)}%**{delta\('erfolgsrate'\)} | {prev.get\('erfolgsrate',0\) if prev else 'вҖ“'}% |"\)
w\(f"| {c_icon} **Гҳ Coverage**  | **{cur.get\('avg_coverage',0\)}%**{delta\('avg_coverage'\)} | {prev.get\('avg_coverage',0\) if prev else 'вҖ“'}% |"\)
w\(f"| рҹ§Ә **Tests**        | **{cur.get\('total_tests',0\)}** | {prev.get\('total_tests',0\) if prev else 'вҖ“'} |"\)
w\(\)
w\(f"Letzte {len\(recent\)} Builds \(Erfolgsrate\): `{spark}`"\)
w\(\)

last10 = list\(reversed\(trend[-10:]\)\)
w\("<details><summary>рҹ“Ӣ Build History \(letzte 10 Runs\)</summary>"\)
w\(\)
w\("| Run | Commit | Branch | Tests | Erfolgsrate | Coverage |"\)
w\("|---|---|---|---|---|---|"\)
for e in last10:
    ts    = e.get\("timestamp",""\)[:10]
    s     = e.get\("erfolgsrate", 0\)
    cov   = e.get\("avg_coverage", 0\)
    s_em  = "рҹҹў" if s   >= 90 else "рҹҹЎ" if s   >= 75 else "рҹ”ҙ"
    c_em  = "рҹҹў" if cov >= 75 else "рҹҹЎ" if cov >= 50 else "рҹ”ҙ"
    w\(f"| #{e.get\('build','?'\)} _{ts}_ | `{e.get\('commit',''\)[:7]}` | `{e.get\('branch','main'\)}` | {e.get\('total_tests',0\)} | {s_em} {s}% | {c_em} {cov}% |"\)
w\(\)
w\("</details>"\)
out.close\(\)
print\(open\("/tmp/summary_test.md"\).read\(\)\)
EOF)
